# 📊 June Dashboard (React + Tailwind)

A modern dashboard UI built using **React (Vite)** and **Tailwind CSS**, showcasing customer insights, activation metrics, and automated reporting cards.

---

## 🚀 Features

* 📈 Company activation progress bars
* 🤖 Auto-generated customer reports
* 🎉 Milestone notifications UI
* 🔗 CRM integration preview
* ⚡ Clean component-based architecture

---

## 🛠️ Tech Stack

* React (Vite)
* Tailwind CSS
* JSX Components

---

## 📁 Folder Structure

```
src/
│
├── App.jsx
├── JuneDashboard.jsx
├── assets/
├── App.css
├── index.css
├── main.jsx
```

---

## ▶️ Getting Started

### 1. Install dependencies

```bash
npm install
```

### 2. Run the app

```bash
npm run dev
```

### 3. Open in browser

```
http://localhost:5173
```

---

## 🧠 Concepts Used

* **CSS Grid** → Main layout (dashboard structure)
* **Flexbox** → Internal alignment (icons, text, rows)
* **Component Reusability** → Clean and scalable code

---

## 📸 Preview

Dashboard includes:

* Auto Reports Card
* Company Activation Metrics
* Milestones Section
* CRM Integration UI
